projects.name: Orbit-7 Satellite Bus
projects.description: 150-kg Earth-observation satellite bus for CNES. PDR planned mid-July 2026, CDR October, launch Q1-2027.

deliverables.name: PDR Data Pack
deliverables.notes: Bundle for PDR review — SW / HW ICDs, risk register, EVM snapshot.

meetings.name: Weekly PM sync
meetings.notes: Sofia leads. Fortnightly customer update Fridays.

openPoints.title: Radiation-tolerant SDRAM sourcing
openPoints.notes: Two-vendor path required; primary on 12-week lead.

openPoints.title: TVAC slot deconfliction with Mosaic-3
openPoints.notes: Talk to Mateus Vieira — potential pull-in.

openPoints.title: Contingency for TT&C link margin
openPoints.notes: Add margin analysis if ITU delays antenna licensing.

risks.title: TVAC facility availability slip
risks.mitigation: Book partner facility as backup; pull-in AIT by 2 weeks if primary slips.

risks.title: Battery vendor lock-in
risks.mitigation: Dual-source Li-ion cells; qualify vendor B by CDR.

risks.title: OBC radiation SEU higher than spec
risks.mitigation: FDIR handles single-bit; add memory scrubbing task in FSW.

risks.title: Launch slot slips to Q2-2027
risks.mitigation: Sofia to negotiate booster slot commitments Q1 vs Q2.

risks.title: Reuse Mosaic-3 FSW heritage
risks.mitigation: IP transfer with sister mission — up to 6 weeks of FSW work saved.

risks.title: Volume Li-ion discount with sister mission
risks.mitigation: Combine PO with Mosaic-3 for 12 % unit-price reduction.

risks.title: Earlier TVAC slot at partner facility
risks.mitigation: Partner offered August slot — pull TVAC in 4 weeks.

decisions.title: Adopt 3U bus form-factor
decisions.rationale: Trade-off vs 6U: mass margin acceptable, launch cost 22 % lower.

decisions.title: Single-vendor rad-hard OBC
decisions.rationale: Dual-source qualification would add ≥ 8 weeks to schedule.

changes.title: Add FDIR scope to PDR data pack
changes.description: Expand FDIR analysis to include single-point failures in TT&C and AOCS.
changes.analysis: ≈ 2 additional weeks of FSW + verification effort. Offset by Mosaic-3 heritage.

changes.title: Pull-in TVAC by 4 weeks
changes.description: Move TVAC campaign from week 24 to week 20.
changes.analysis: Post-CDR margin shrinks to 2 weeks. Worth it if TVAC risk materialises.

actions.title: Compile PDR data-pack v1.4
actions.description: Assemble complete PDR data pack: block diagrams, ICDs, risk register, EVM snapshot, action closure list.
actions.notes: Draft sent to Arjun and Marie 2026-06-28.

history.what: Note added: Draft sent to Arjun and Marie

actions.title: PDR data-pack ICD sign-off
actions.description: Waiting on formal ICD sign-off from CNES programme office.
actions.notes: Follow-up chain in customer link folder.

tasks.title: File signed ICD in project archive

actions.title: Evaluate Mosaic-3 FSW heritage transfer
actions.description: Sister-mission SE proposed IP transfer of FSW libraries. Assess reuse fraction and integration cost.

actions.title: Memory scrubbing logic in FSW
actions.description: Mitigation for OBC SEU risk. Periodic memory scrub + ECC status polling.

actions.title: Confirm TVAC chamber booking
actions.description: Waiting on facility calendar. Backup partner slot on hold.

actions.title: Thermal model v20 — hot-case
actions.description: Update hot-case with revised MLI coverage.

actions.title: Primary structure FE model — Rev B
Watchdog logic in FSW
actions.description: One day late — see slip below.

actions.title: AOCS controller v3 — slew law
actions.description: Refine slew maneuver control law post-PDR.

actions.title: EPS block diagram + dual-source cell qual plan
actions.description: Include dual-source path to mitigate battery vendor lock-in risk.

tasks.title: Send draft to Marie for review

actions.title: Vendor contact spreadsheet refresh
actions.notes: Low priority — snoozed until after PDR.

projects.name: Helios-2 Ground Station Retrofit
projects.description: Ops software + RF chain retrofit for MetSat Corp's Helios-2 ground station. Design freeze Sep 2026.

decisions.title: Adopt Node.js + Timescale for telemetry pipeline

actions.title: Site acceptance procedure — draft
actions.description: MetSat requested a written ATP for field trial. Reuse ECSS framework.

projects.name: Falcon-P2 Autonomous Drone Swarm
projects.description: Early-stage R&D for autonomous drone swarm testbed. Grant window opens in 6 weeks.

openPoints.title: Test site authorisation with civil aviation

risks.title: Civil aviation authorisation slip
risks.mitigation: Start authorisation paperwork before airframe design freeze.

risks.title: R&D grant secured

actions.title: R&D grant proposal — narrative + budget
actions.description: Marie lead-authors; sister-mission SE providing letter of support.

actions.title: Airframe concept — quad vs hex trade-off
actions.description: Not urgent — informs swarm density decisions.

- Chase @Isabelle Fournier on ICD sign-off (blocking #a_o_extown)

## Open decisions
- Single-source rad-hard OBC under review (see ORB-D2)

## Sister-mission heritage
- @Mateus Vieira offered FSW libs — evaluate reuse (see #a_o_extorig)
